zh.Roskilde, Sjælland, Denmark: 丹麥亞藍德洛斯吉爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當King Abel von Dänemark於1218年4月25日出生在丹麥亞藍德洛斯吉爾德時，他的父親Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen47歲，母親Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark26歲。他和Mechtilde af Holsten至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1252年6月22日在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦享年34歲，埋葬在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維史萊斯維史萊斯維格 多姆。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Abel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the younger son of Adam and Eve, who was murdered for reasons of jealousy by his brother Cain (Genesis 4:1–8). The Hebrew form is Hevel, ostensibly representing the vocabulary word hevel ‘breath, vapour’, and so taken to imply vanity or worthlessness. Abel is considered by the Christian Church to have been a pre-Christian martyr (see Matthew 23:35), and is invoked as a saint in the litany for the dying. Nevertheless, his name has not been much used either before or after its brief vogue among the Puritans.

en.lifeSummary: When King Abel von Dänemark was born on 25 April 1218, in Roskilde, Sjælland, Denmark, his father, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, was 47 and his mother, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, was 26. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mechtilde af Holsten. He died on 22 June 1252, in Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, at the age of 34, and was buried in Schleswig Cathedral, Schleswig, Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Abel von Dänemark est né le 25 avril 1218, à Roskilde, Sjælland, Danemark, son père, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mechtilde af Holsten. Il est décédé le 22 juin 1252, à Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Schleswiger Dom, Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne.

de.Schleswig Cathedral, Schleswig-Holstein,: Schleswiger Dom, Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als King Abel von Dänemark am 25. April 1218 in Roskilde, Sjælland, Dänemark geboren wurde, war sein Vater Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen 47 und seine Mutter Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark 26. Er hatte mit Mechtilde af Holsten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Juni 1252 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland und wurde in Schleswiger Dom, Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Abel von Dänemark è nato il il 25 aprile 1218 nel Roskilde, Sjælland, Danimarca, il suo padre, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mechtilde af Holsten. Morì il 22 giugno 1252, nel Schleswig-Holstein, Germania, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Schleswiger Dom, Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: King Abel von Dänemark(이)가 1218년 4월 25일 덴마크 스jae랜드 로스킬드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Mechtilde af Holsten(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 6월 22일 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 슐레스위그 슐레스위그 슐레스위거 돔에 묻혔다.

pt.Schleswig Cathedral, Schleswig-Holstein,: Schleswiger Dom, Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Abel von Dänemark nasceu em 25 de abril de 1218, em Roskilde, Sjælland, Dinamarca, seu pai, Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mechtilde af Holsten. Ele faleceu em 22 de junho de 1252, em Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Schleswiger Dom, Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Abel von Dänemark родился 25 апреля 1218 г. в местности роскаилд, сджaeлланд, Дания, его отцу по имени Valdemar 'Sejr' Valdemarsen было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Berengaria Sanches, Queen of Denmark, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mechtilde af Holsten. Он умер 22 июня 1252 г. в местности щлесвиг-холстин, Германия в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности щлесвигир дом, щлесвиг, крис щлесвиг, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия.
